nasb.text: In My zeal and in My blazing wrath I declare that on that day there will surely be a great earthquake in the land of Israel.

esv.text: For in my jealousy and in my blazing wrath I declare, On that day there shall be a great earthquake in the land of Israel.

cnv.text: 我在妒恨和怒火之中說：到那日，以色列地必有大地震。

ccb.text: 我要在义愤和烈怒中宣告，那天在以色列必有大地震。
